Class OpenAir

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.model.OpenAir
All Implemented Interfaces:
Venue
public class OpenAir extends Object implements Venue
The OpenAir class represents an open air venue with a name, type, and capacity. It implements the Venue interface to provide methods for accessing and modifying venue details.
Author:
Francisco Garcia
